<!--
Thanks for contributing! A few pointers before you submit:
- Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR beats one big one.
- CONTRIBUTING.md covers test commands, branch naming, and the ROADMAP
  checkbox convention (tasks move [ ] → [~] → [x] in a single commit).
- Don't skip hooks or sign-off — see CONTRIBUTING.md for the git rules.
-->

## What this does

<!-- One-paragraph summary focused on the WHY, not a list of files. -->

## Why now

<!-- Link the ROADMAP task or issue this closes. If this is a fix, link
     the user report or pilot note that surfaced it. -->

- Related: #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (behavior, CLI, or API)
- [ ] Docs / CI / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` green locally (or `pytest -m slow` if the change touches durability paths)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has a test
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under the appropriate `## [x.y.z]` section
- [ ] ROADMAP checkbox flipped if this closes a planned task
- [ ] Docstrings / CONTRIBUTING / README updated if user-visible surface changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or machine-specific paths committed

## Screenshots / output

<!-- CLI output, before/after, benchmark numbers, etc. -->
